Source URL: https://www.score.org/how-mentoring-works/

# BOSS Mentor Handoff Summary Template for SCORE Referral

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, boss-process, mentor-handoff, referral-template

## Resource purpose
Reusable BOSS template for preparing a concise SCORE mentor handoff summary. This helps the entrepreneur and mentor begin with the right facts and decision points.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Generate this summary when recommending SCORE mentoring, especially for Ideation, Validation, Formation, funding-readiness, operations troubleshooting, or Houston-local referrals.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages.

## Key resources or subresources
- Client name and location/ZIP if known.
- Business lifecycle stage and confidence.
- Business concept or existing business description.
- Target customer and geographic market.
- What the client has already done or spent money on.
- Primary decision or problem needing mentor help.
- Known constraints: capital, time, skills, equipment, partners, permits, debt, urgency.
- Special resource flags: veteran, woman-owned, minority-owned, disabled founder, rural, military spouse, government-contracting interest, nonprofit, etc.
- Relevant SCORE resources already recommended.
- Questions for the first mentor session.

## BOSS routing notes
- Keep the summary factual and concise. Do not overstate eligibility, viability, funding likelihood, or legal/tax conclusions.
- For 77084/Houston users, include “Interested in SCORE Houston local mentoring; open to national virtual specialist if needed.”
- Use this handoff after enough discovery exists; if not enough is known, ask one more focused discovery question before handoff.

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
